title: Cured and Caramelized Goober Chesty Delight
description: A sweet and savory dish featuring cured goober paired with caramelized chesty. Perfect for a dinner or snack.
instructions: 2. In a small bowl, combine cure and 1 tsp water to make a paste.
3. Spread the goober on a baking sheet and brush the cure paste evenly.
4. Roast in the oven for 20-25 minutes or until caramelized.
5. While the goober is roasting, heat 1 tbsp oil in a pan over medium heat.
6. Add the chesty and cook until caramelized, about 5-7 minutes.
7. Remove the goober from the oven and let cool slightly.
8. Serve the roasted goober with the caramelized chesty.
9. Enjoy as a snack or dessert.
